threats.title: Microsoft 365 Password Phishing Campaign
threats.description: Users receive urgent emails claiming their password has expired, with a link to a fake login portal 'login.microsoft-secure-update.com' designed to harvest credentials.

threats.title: LockBit Ransomware Variant targeting local shares
threats.description: A ransomware strain encrypts user documents with the extension '.locky' and creates files named 'DECRYPT_INSTRUCTIONS.txt' demanding payment in BTC.

threats.title: Fake Bank Verification Fraud via SMS
threats.description: Spoofed SMS alerts pretending to be from Chase Bank claiming unauthorized transactions, prompting users to call a toll-free number where scammers request banking details.

threats.title: Malicious PDF containing banking Trojan
threats.description: An email attachment named 'Invoice_June_2026.pdf' exploits a PDF reader vulnerability to silently download and execute a keystroke logger.

threats.title: Credential Stuffing attack on corporate intranet
threats.description: Automated brute-forcing attacks using breached username/password databases trying to log into the corporate remote access portals.
